ready_now_tasks.hypothesis: The remaining misreads cluster into a small number of repetitive semantic patterns that can be reviewed faster in grouped form than row by row.
ready_now_tasks.used_for: owner review of whether semantic v2 should stay feature-side only or motivate bounded label splitting
ready_now_tasks.fixed_dataset_or_pool: V1.12B frozen pilot dataset plus V1.12G prediction outputs
ready_now_tasks.success_if: Produces stable grouped error buckets by symbol, stage, prediction direction, and semantic-v2 feature profile.
ready_now_tasks.stop_if: Buckets fail to reduce review complexity or collapse into one-off idiosyncratic cases.

ready_now_tasks.hypothesis: Some high_level_consolidation samples belong to distinct candidate subclusters that should be reviewed separately instead of being treated as one coarse state.
ready_now_tasks.used_for: candidate label-split discovery without changing the formal label schema
ready_now_tasks.fixed_dataset_or_pool: Only V1.12B high_level_consolidation rows with V1.12G semantic-v2 features
ready_now_tasks.fixed_output_template: 2-4 candidate subclusters plus per-cluster summary stats and representative rows
ready_now_tasks.success_if: Produces candidate subclusters with materially different error rates or semantic-v2 profiles.
ready_now_tasks.stop_if: Clusters are unstable, uninterpretable, or do not differ on error behavior.

ready_now_tasks.hypothesis: One of the three new semantic catalyst-state fields explains most of the hotspot-control delta and should therefore be prioritized for future refinement.
ready_now_tasks.used_for: feature refinement prioritization without changing labels or widening dataset scope
ready_now_tasks.fixed_dataset_or_pool: V1.12B frozen pilot dataset with V1.12G feature schema v2
ready_now_tasks.fixed_output_template: ablation comparison table under same split and same model family
ready_now_tasks.success_if: Ablation results show repeatable hotspot FP deltas for at least one semantic field.
ready_now_tasks.stop_if: No semantic field shows repeatable marginal value beyond noise.

interpretation: Current lawful subagent work includes one structuring task, one drafting task, and one execution task.
None of these tasks is allowed to rewrite labels or change mainline direction.
Review cadence should follow task type: repetitive pipeline work can accumulate to a bounded threshold, while candidate-structure drafting should be reviewed at the end of the bounded thematic stage.
